category_sources: Official Arch makepkg manual describes makepkg as a package build utility that automates building packages from PKGBUILD files.
source_facts.description says "Compile and build packages suitable for installation with pacman".
display_name_sources: Official Arch manual page title and NAME section use makepkg.
docs_sources: Official Arch manual page documents makepkg(8).
source_facts.homepage points to the official Arch Wiki makepkg page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://gitlab.archlinux.org/pacman/pacman, so repo was intentionally returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official Arch makepkg manual describes PKGBUILD-based package building and pacman output.
source_facts.description identifies package compilation for pacman.
